text.title: Plan-Execute vs ReAct Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to emit a validated agent-loop spec from a task spec.

section.title: Procedure
section.p: Step 1 — Parse task-spec.yaml. Validate goal + drivers populated.
Step 2 — Compute drivers (known_substeps, horizon, adaptability_needed, audit_required, mixed_predictability).
Step 3 — Walk content/06-decision-tree.xml. Pick loop_type (plan-execute / react / hybrid).
Step 4 — Set max_turns. For ReAct/Hybrid, MUST be >= 1 (r4). Default 5 for per-step hybrid loops; 10 for ReAct.
